name: Upholstered Bench Rust Boucle - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a touch of textural charm to your seating ensemble with the Upholstered Bench Rust Boucle from Room Essentials™. This rectangle bench stands on four legs designed with a wooden frame to make it a functional addition to your home. Showcasing an upholstered design, this bench is a stylish addition to your home decor or dorm furniture.


Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Width: 36.2 inches
Overall Height: 17.5 inches
Overall Depth: 17.3 inches
Distance from floor to bottom of seat: 12.2 inches
